mapper.insert: insert into xhbs_points_user_out_bill_detail (member_id, points, remaining_points, description, order_no_src, activity_key, activity_name, event_key, event_name, account_type, bill_status, is_del) values (#{memberId}, #{points}, #{remainingPoints}, #{description}, #{orderNoSrc}, #{activityKey}, #{activityName}, #{eventKey}, #{eventName}, #{accountType}, #{billStatus}, #{isDel})
